name: Capital Bancorp Inc
summary: Capital Bancorp Inc is a bank holding company operating Capital Bank, N.A., offering commercial real estate and commercial business loans, residential mortgage banking, SBA and USDA government-guaranteed lending, and the OpenSky credit card division. The company also acquired Integrated Financial Holdings, Inc. (IFH), which includes Windsor Advantage, a platform servicing and packaging SBA and USDA loans on behalf of other lenders.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Lending products focused on commercial real estate for business clients.

products.name: Commercial Business Loans
products.description: Business lending products targeting commercial clients.

products.name: Residential Mortgage Banking
products.description: Mortgage origination and banking services for residential customers.

products.name: SBA and USDA Government-Guaranteed Loans
products.description: Origination of SBA and USDA guaranteed loans within Capital Bank, N.A.

products.name: OpenSky Credit Card
products.description: Consumer credit card division subject to consumer finance and fraud prevention regulations.

products.name: Windsor Advantage
products.description: Platform for servicing, processing, and packaging SBA and USDA loans on behalf of third-party lenders.

partnerships.description: Origination and servicing of SBA government-guaranteed loans.
Origination and servicing of USDA government-guaranteed loans.
